posts.author: Karo1 (Karo)
posts.cookedHtml:
When clicking through different boards/dashboards/any file in the workspace, the top and bottom edges of the icons are not responsive to clicks, very minor inconvenicence but easily fixable.
On the screenshot you can see the unresponsive areas.
